history.text: Britain created the Bechuanaland Protectorate placed the territory under outside administration.
Botswana became independent with Seretse Khama as its first president.
Major diamond deposits were discovered at Orapa, reshaping the economy.
Botswana held another peaceful multiparty election, reinforcing its democratic continuity.
